---
title: "St. Hugh’s College"
---

## St. Hugh’s College

**Type:** organization

### About

This was founded in 1886 as St. Hugh’s Hall, for women students who were too poor to afford Lady Margaret Hall.  Its first principal was Annie Moberly. It became a college of Oxford University in 1959.  Its website is www.st-hughs.ox.ac.uk

### Letters Mentioning This Organization

- [To Elizabeth Harcourt Mitchell, July 31, 1899.](../letters/3414_To_Elizabeth_Harcourt_Mitchell.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
